rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR INJUNCTION DENIED. ARTICLE III SECTION 32 CALIFORNIA CONSTITUTION STATES "NO LEGAL OR EQUITABLE PROCESS SHALL ISSUE IN ANY COURT AGAINST THIS STATE OR ANY OFFICER THEREOF TO PREVENT OR ENJOIN COLLECTION OF ANY TAX." (302/AJR/PB)
